top_findings.title: Test gate failed: test_coverage=0.0 — tests did not execute
top_findings.evidence: retort.db test_coverage=0.0. Archive lacks data/kaggle/ directory and node_modules/, preventing build and test execution.
top_findings.suggestion: Ensure CSV data files and npm dependencies are available at scoring time

top_findings.title: 12 tests written but none executed
top_findings.evidence: test/queries.test.ts:1-107 defines 12 test cases covering all query functions, but test_coverage=0.0 from retort.db means none ran
top_findings.suggestion: Fix test environment (data/kaggle/ + node_modules) so tests execute
